'''vodajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ileocolic|ileocolic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ileocolic|ileocolic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vodajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodajithi|vodajithi]] || [[word:vodajiji|vodajiji]] || [[word:vodajishi|vodajishi]] || [[word:vodajiki|vodajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodajuthuthu|vodajuthuthu]] || [[word:vodajujuju|vodajujuju]] || [[word:vodajushushu|vodajushushu]] || [[word:vodajukuku|vodajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodajuthu|vodajuthu]] || [[word:vodajuju|vodajuju]] || [[word:vodajushu|vodajushu]] || [[word:vodajuku|vodajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodajufthuf|vodajufthuf]] || [[word:vodajufjuf|vodajufjuf]] || [[word:vodajufshuf|vodajufshuf]] || [[word:vodajufkuf|vodajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodajethe|vodajethe]] || [[word:vodajeje|vodajeje]] || [[word:vodajeshe|vodajeshe]] || [[word:vodajeke|vodajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodajothotho|vodajothotho]] || [[word:vodajojojo|vodajojojo]] || [[word:vodajoshosho|vodajoshosho]] || [[word:vodajokoko|vodajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodajotho|vodajotho]] || [[word:vodajojo|vodajojo]] || [[word:vodajosho|vodajosho]] || [[word:vodajoko|vodajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodajofthof|vodajofthof]] || [[word:vodajofjof|vodajofjof]] || [[word:vodajofshof|vodajofshof]] || [[word:vodajofkof|vodajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfthÃŸf|vodajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfjÃŸf|vodajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfshÃŸf|vodajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfkÃŸf|vodajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vodajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vodajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vodajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vodajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfthÃŸf|vodajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfjÃŸf|vodajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfshÃŸf|vodajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfkÃŸf|vodajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfthÃŸf|vodajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfjÃŸf|vodajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfshÃŸf|vodajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vodajÃŸfkÃŸf|vodajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodajÃḊthÃḊ|vodajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vodajÃḊjÃḊ|vodajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vodajÃḊshÃḊ|vodajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vodajÃḊkÃḊ|vodajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodajathatha|vodajathatha]] || [[word:vodajajaja|vodajajaja]] || [[word:vodajashasha|vodajashasha]] || [[word:vodajakaka|vodajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodajatha|vodajatha]] || [[word:vodajaja|vodajaja]] || [[word:vodajasha|vodajasha]] || [[word:vodajaka|vodajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodajafthaf|vodajafthaf]] || [[word:vodajafjaf|vodajafjaf]] || [[word:vodajafshaf|vodajafshaf]] || [[word:vodajafkaf|vodajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vodajasha|vodajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodajshÃḋasha|vodajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodajroasha|vodajroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodajmuasha|vodajmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodajyaasha|vodajyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodajnkshÃḋasha|govodajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodajnkroasha|govodajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodajnkmuasha|govodajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodajnkyaasha|govodajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vodadajasha|vodadajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodadajshÃḋasha|vodadajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodadajroasha|vodadajroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodadajmuasha|vodadajmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodadajyaasha|vodadajyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodadajnkshÃḋasha|govodadajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodadajnkroasha|govodadajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodadajnkmuasha|govodadajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodadajnkyaasha|govodadajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vedÃḊjasha|vedÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vedÃḊjshÃḋasha|vedÃḊjshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vedÃḊjroasha|vedÃḊjroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vedÃḊjmuasha|vedÃḊjmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vedÃḊjyaasha|vedÃḊjyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govedÃḊjnkshÃḋasha|govedÃḊjnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govedÃḊjnkroasha|govedÃḊjnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govedÃḊjnkmuasha|govedÃḊjnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govedÃḊjnkyaasha|govedÃḊjnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vodfajasha|vodfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodfajshÃḋasha|vodfajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodfajroasha|vodfajroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodfajmuasha|vodfajmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodfajyaasha|vodfajyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodfajnkshÃḋasha|govodfajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodfajnkroasha|govodfajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodfajnkmuasha|govodfajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodfajnkyaasha|govodfajnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
